title.en: When these realm gods heard this, they were imm...

content.en:
"Ye Heavenly Realm Divine !!!"

These Realm Gods of the Realm Court Branch were surprised, they didn't expect Ye Tian Realm Gods to appear in this super-large Eternal Realm Alliance.

Did the Ye Heavenly Realm God come before them, or was he related to this super-large Eternal Realm Alliance?

"Ye Heaven Realm God, you are ...... with this super-large Eternal Realm Alliance," one of the Realm Gods asked.

Ye Tian said directly: "This Eternal Realm Alliance was cultivated by me, but it has never been opened to the outside world, so the Realm Court doesn't know about it. "

When these realm gods heard this, they were immediately shocked.

They didn't expect that this super-large Eternal Realm Alliance was actually cultivated by Ye Tian, and it was not too difficult to create a super-large Eternal Realm, and the multiple realm gods had collected some Eternal Decrees, and if they opened it up together, they could open "210" to open it out.

However, it is an exaggeration to open up a thousand eternal realms without the realm of the realm knowing, and without contacting the outside world!

You know, opening up so many eternal realms will inevitably attract a large number of demon seeds, how can you keep it without enough realm gods?

Several super-large alliances of the Eternal Realm have been guarded by hundreds of Realm Gods for a long time.

There are so many realm gods, they can't hide it at all.

At this moment, they were shocked how Ye Tian did it!

"Ye Tian Realm God, according to the requirements of the Realm Court, we need to enter this super-large Eternal Realm Alliance to take a look!" said one of the Realm Gods.

"Okay, come in, everybody!"

Ye Tian took several realm gods into the Endless Realm Alliance.

As soon as they entered the Endless Realm Alliance, these realm gods unleashed their will and observed the situation here.

Soon, they were even more shocked.

They weren't shocked by the strength of the Endless Realm Alliance, after all, the Terran Race had just developed, and the number of Eternal Dao Realms was not as large as those super-large Eternal Realm Alliances.

However, there is only one race within the Endless Realms Alliance.

You must know that the races within the other Eternal Kingdom Alliance are very chaotic, there are humanoid races, and there are special beast races, although most of them will turn into human form, but even if they don't turn into human form, it won't affect anything.

It would be too difficult for a single force to open up a super-large Eternal Realm Alliance.

And now it is clear that Ye Tian has developed his race into a super-large Eternal Realm Alliance, occupying countless resources.

Along the way, they found that most of the territory of the Endless Kingdom Alliance was empty, after all, one eternal kingdom was incomparably vast, let alone a thousand eternal kingdoms.

The reproduction speed of the human race is fast, that is also ordinary humans and ordinary cultivators, and the reproduction speed of the mythical to the Dao realm is very slow.

Even if Ye Tian allowed the Terrans in the Void Domain to continue to migrate over, causing the population of the Endless Kingdom Alliance to skyrocket, it was still difficult to fill the entire Endless Kingdom Alliance.

Therefore, the entire Endless Realm Alliance is still empty, and there are resources everywhere.

Seeing such a situation in the Endless Realm Alliance, these realm gods had an idea in their hearts, but they didn't say it immediately.

......

Soon.

These realm gods followed Ye Tian to the new capital of the Endless Realm Alliance, where they entertained these realm gods.

"Good!"

Ye Tian briefly talked about the situation of the Endless Realm Alliance.

Subsequently, he chatted with these realm gods for a long time.

Suddenly.

A realm god said: "Ye Tian Realm God, according to the rules of the realm court, any Eternal Realm Alliance must be allowed to accept other living beings, so the realm court will appropriately arrange some creatures to settle in the Endless Kingdom Alliance in the future and become a member of the Endless Kingdom Alliance, and even arrange for small forces to settle in, which will also greatly increase the strength of the Endless Kingdom Alliance, so as to better resist the demon seed." "

As soon as Ye Tian heard this, his face immediately changed.

He knew very well that these realm gods also took a fancy to the Endless Kingdom Alliance, because the Endless Kingdom Alliance did not have the Demon Seed Abyss, the situation was very good, and it was rich in resources, no matter which force wanted to come in!

But Ye Tian cultivated the Endless Realm Alliance, he just wanted this place to become the territory of the Terran race, but he didn't want forces outside the Terran to come in........

So, Ye Tian immediately said: "Several, this is not necessary, our human race can still resist the invasion of demon seeds, and the human race does not like to deal with external forces, it is very xenophobic, and it is easy to clash with other forces." Therefore, there is no trouble for the Realm Court. "

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, what does this mean?"

These realm gods are also unhappy.

"Ye Tian Realm God, each super-large eternal realm is only occupied by one race, if they are all so selfish, how can they develop?" said one of the realm gods.

Ye Tian sneered: "Several, I have also been to the realm of the Realm of the Gods, many eternal realms are occupied by one force, and other forces are not allowed to settle in, why can't my human race occupy the Endless Kingdom Alliance? "

"Ye Tian Realm God, even in the Realm God Realm, there is no force that directly occupies a thousand eternal realms!"

What else do they want to say.

However, Ye Tian waved his hand, "Several, if you want other forces to enter the Endless Realm Alliance, I won't allow it, there is no need to talk about this matter!"

"Ye Tian 5.2 Realm God, you have to think clearly, once you refuse other forces to settle in like this, then the Realm Court will not help the Endless Kingdom Alliance, even if the demon seed invades the Endless Kingdom Alliance in the future, there will be no Realm God to help. "

A realm god said.

Ye Tian said indifferently: "You overestimate yourself too much, in the Eternal Realm, the Realm Court Branch really doesn't have the strength to help our Endless Realm Alliance! Moreover, it is impossible for the Realm God Realm to send too many strong people over, and the Eternal Realm is not that important." "

These realm gods were also very annoyed.

However, Ye Tianyi waved his hand and said, "A few people, you can leave!"

These Realm Gods didn't continue to say anything, and left directly, returning to the Realm Court Branch.

They also need to report the situation to the Underworld God of the Realm of the Realm Division, so that the Underworld God can come to Ye Tian's trouble.
